detail: Provider and model identities are replaced by stable profile identifiers.
Exact metric values, timestamps, source filenames and high-precision scores are not published.
Prompt contents are not published. Only Q01 to Q04 identifiers are released.
Flat or non-discriminating fields, including cost_score, baseline_reference_energy and density_risk_coefficient, are excluded from this release.
Inter-wave variability is based on three repeated measurement waves. It is exploratory and is not a long-horizon stability estimate.
A limited non-semantic stream collection failure was remediated under the same measurement configuration before public aggregation. Original records remain preserved in the private audit corpus.
This release documents anonymized runtime behavior profiles. It does not rank, certify or declare a universal best system.
